markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, CTA strategy, and future topics.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CTA Strategy Paused:** GrowthX's proposal for dynamic blog CTAs is on hold. N-able will use static banners from its internal creative team, avoiding the security review required for GrowthX to get Webflow CMS access.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Priority:** N-able wants to improve brand visibility in LLMs for "cybersecurity software" searches. GrowthX proposed comparison listicles as a key tactic, which N-able will now consider.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**New Content Clusters:** Two new topic clusters are approved: CMMC Compliance (per Joel, N-central PMM) and MDR Verticals (research underway).](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Process Refinement:** To speed up publishing, Elaine is streamlining the PMM review process. GrowthX will standardize Airtable image exports to JPEG to reduce file sizes and improve consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

## Topics

### LLM Visibility & New Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Improve N-able's visibility in LLMs for broad searches like "cybersecurity software" to support the brand shift from "RMM House" to a cybersecurity leader.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Proposed Tactic:** Publish comparison listicles (e.g., "Top 5 Tools for X").](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This content format is highly effective for LLM citation and allows N-able to own the narrative around its competitive set.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [**Challenge:** N-able has historically avoided this format due to PMM alignment issues.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**GrowthX Tool:** GrowthX is creating an LLM visibility profile for N-able in its new tool to provide granular tracking data.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide a strategic rationale and examples to help N-able build an internal case for this content.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Content Pipeline & New Clusters

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** 10 articles published; 5 in production this week (including 3 "Attack Resilience" pieces).](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**PMM Review Process:** Elaine is streamlining the review queue by assigning articles to specific PMMs (e.g., vulnerability prioritization → Joel) to reduce bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [**New Topic Clusters Approved:**](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [**CMMC Compliance:** Based on topics provided by Joel (N-central PMM).](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [**MDR Verticals:** Keyword research is underway. Existing MDR topics will be moved from "Considering" to this new cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### Blog CTA Strategy

  - [**GrowthX Proposal:** Use existing website "blocks" to create dynamic, product-specific CTAs at the end of blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Block Examples:** AdLumen, N-central, Cove.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Webflow CMS access for GrowthX to build the blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**N-able Decision:** Rejected the proposal for now.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Reason:** The required security review for CMS access is too time-intensive.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Alternative:** N-able will use static banners from its internal creative team.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Airtable Image Export Issue

  - [**Problem:** Inconsistent image exports from Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Issues:** Mixed file types (PNG/JPEG), varying sizes, and occasional incomplete downloads.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [**Request:** Standardize exports to JPEG to ensure consistency and smaller file sizes.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [Provide strategic rationale and examples for comparison listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [Share MDR Verticals keyword research by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Standardize Airtable image exports to JPEG.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Schedule a strategic work session next week to align on LLM visibility prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [**Elaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Continue streamlining the PMM review process.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [Join the LLM visibility work session.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Join the LLM visibility work session.](https://fathom.video/share/D67sktN7msXN84tLoC4kEQogz14nr8Tq?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
